violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (beverages) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
The (wall ) in the (utility ) area is in poor repair. Observed hole near ice machine. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
